scripts.deploy:lambda: zip -j /tmp/function.zip lambda/index.mjs && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name buenavista-chat-proxy --zip-file fileb:///tmp/function.zip --region us-east-1
scripts.upload:widget: aws s3 cp widget/widget.js s3://buenavista-widget/widget.js --content-type application/javascript
